name: 14q31_GALC_SD
description: GALC (galactosylceramidase, Krabbe disease) at 14q31.3 region. A common ~30 kb directly-oriented SD pair at 99% identity flanking GALC mediates a recurrent ~30 kb deletion of exons 11-17 that is the most common Krabbe-disease allele in European populations.

architecture.internal_structure: Two ~5 kb direct SDs at >99% identity ~30 kb apart inside GALC; NAHR yields the 30-kb exon 11-17 deletion.
